text: <par>Cf. Bunan lak-ca 'lick'. Co-allofams? This word is apparently distinct from Bunan <latinform>lak◦ca</latinform> 'lick' < *m-lyak 629.</par>
<par>The first syllable of this form is to be compared to the second syllable of Bahing <latinform>sy-pyr</latinform> 'navel'. See <xref ref="528">#528</xref>, below.</par>
<par>see below: <latinform>lua</latinform>?/<latinform>lwa</latinform>, etc. M2: m or s?</par>
